name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new best practice or pattern
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Pattern
What best practice or pattern should be added?

## Privacy Relevance
How does this pattern relate to user privacy?
- [ ] Directly privacy-related (data protection, consent, etc.)
- [ ] Indirectly privacy-related (security, performance, etc.)
- [ ] General Android best practice

## Use Case
When would a developer need this pattern?

## Example
If possible, provide a code example or link to official documentation.

## Suggested Reference File
Where should this pattern be documented?
- [ ] New reference file: _______________
- [ ] Existing file: _______________
